line: - The repo currently has unrelated pre-existing compile drift in `crates/membrain-core/src/health.rs`, so broad crate validation is noisy; targeted Dream validation was the useful acceptance signal here.

line: - Full `cargo check -p membrain-core -p membrain-cli` is still blocked by unrelated existing `health.rs` errors, including missing attention/prewarm helpers and `PrefetchController::capacity()` usage.

items: Full `cargo check -p membrain-core -p membrain-cli` is still blocked by unrelated existing `health.rs` errors, including missing attention/prewarm helpers and `PrefetchController::capacity()` usage.

line: - I avoided widening scope into those unrelated failures.

line: - `DreamRun` now synthesizes bounded semantic links from deterministic candidate memories instead of inventing placeholder artifacts from counter values.
- Link proposals are similarity-ranked, capped by `max_links_per_run`, emitted incrementally per bounded poll, and surfaced through the existing inspect/log outputs.
- stable inspect handles and source citations
I also coordinated via Agent Mail as `TopazCompass` and reported the landed Dream core slice to the active Dream-output agent.
